purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 Chapter 4: Thousands Around Us
description: Videos covering prerequisite concepts: 3-digit place value, counting to 1000, comparing 3-digit numbers

videos.title: 3-Digit Place Value Review
videos.description: Review place value for 3-digit numbers. Understand the ones, tens, and hundreds places and how each digit's position determines its value.
learningObjectives: Identify the ones, tens, and hundreds place in a 3-digit number
State the value of each digit based on its position

videos.title: Counting to 1000
videos.description: Learn to count up to 1000 by ones, tens, and hundreds. Understand what happens after 999 and how we build larger numbers from smaller groups.
learningObjectives: Understand the transition from hundreds to thousands

videos.title: Comparing 3-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Learn to compare 3-digit numbers using greater than, less than, and equal to. Start from the hundreds place and work your way down to compare numbers correctly.
learningObjectives: Use place value to determine which number is greater

usageNotes.purpose: Review 3-digit place value, counting to 1000, and comparing 3-digit numbers before learning about thousands and 5-digit numbers in Chapter 4
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select videos based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: 3-digit place value -> Counting to 1000 -> Comparing 3-digit numbers (builds foundational understanding for working with larger numbers)
